title: Design LogAdapter protocol: fans CommonLog output to the right Koma
description: CommonLog is already the logging backbone (wired into MetricKitCrashReportingService). The next layer: a LogAdapter protocol that transforms structured CommonLog output into Koma-consumable input. Each Koma has its own adapter (ContrastAuditAdapter, CrashLogAdapter, AnalyticsAdapter, BuildLogAdapter). The adapters live in service-universal or common-log as an extension. Foundation Models on-device synthesizes the aggregated output into fix suggestions. This is the log → adapter → Koma → receipt → gate-sync-ant circuit that makes the Digikoma fleet reactive to the live system.
